title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China released JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a dual-AI-brain architecture for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced two new humanoid robots including Dyno and VR-H3 for homes, security, and industrial use. NVIDIA unveiled the Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor offering two thousand teraflops of onboard compute for researchers.
